title: Celebration Variety System
summary: Different celebration animations based on chapter, star rating, and special conditions. Adds a CelebrationFactory that selects celebration type based on context: chapter-specific particle themes (circuit symbols, electric sparks, shield shimmer, gate rain), enhanced 3-star effects (spinning star burst), Pure Logic brain emoji particles, improvement-sensitive intensity, and a chapter-colored screen-wide pulse.

tasks.description: Chapter 1-2: Keep classic confetti as-is (current behavior is the default)
acceptance_criteria: Chapters 1 and 2 still use the existing confetti colors and particle shapes
No regression in current celebration behavior

tasks.description: Chapter 3 celebration: Confetti + floating circuit symbol particles (AND, OR, XOR rendered as tiny text particles mixed into the confetti)
acceptance_criteria: When completing a level in Chapter 3 (levels 13-17), some particles render as gate symbol text (AND, OR, XOR) instead of geometric shapes
Gate symbol particles rotate and fade like regular confetti

tasks.description: Chapter 4 celebration: Electric sparks radiating from circuit center outward — particles move outward radially with yellow/cyan spark colors
acceptance_criteria: Chapter 4 (levels 21-25) uses radially-exploding spark particles from the canvas center
Spark colors are yellow, cyan, white to match electrical theme

tasks.description: Chapter 5 celebration: Shield shimmer effect — expanding hexagonal grid pattern using concentric rings that expand outward
acceptance_criteria: Chapter 5 (levels 26-30) renders expanding concentric hexagonal rings with gold/amber shimmer
Rings fade as they expand

tasks.description: Chapter 6 celebration: NAND/NOR gate rain — tiny gate label text particles falling from top of celebration canvas like rain
acceptance_criteria: Chapter 6 (levels 31-34) shows NAND and NOR text particles falling from the top
Particles have varied sizes and fall speeds, orange/copper color scheme

tasks.description: 3-star celebration enhancement: Add spinning star burst behind the star display — golden starburst rays that rotate
acceptance_criteria: When earning 3 stars, a golden rotating starburst effect renders on the celebration canvas
Starburst starts bright and fades over ~2 seconds
Effect combines with the chapter-specific particles

tasks.description: Pure Logic badge earned celebration: Brain emoji explosion (🧠 text particles) when level is completed without hints for the first time
acceptance_criteria: When a level is completed with 0 hints used AND the level didn't previously have pureLogic badge, add brain emoji particles to the celebration
Brain particles mix with the chapter-specific celebration

tasks.description: First-time vs improvement: First solve = gentler celebration intensity. Retry with improvement (better stars) = more intense celebration
acceptance_criteria: First-time level completion uses standard particle count
Improvement completion (better stars than previous) uses 1.5x particle count and slightly faster velocity
Re-completion with same or worse stars uses 0.7x particle count

tasks.description: Create CelebrationFactory that selects celebration type based on context: chapter, stars, pureLogic, isImprovement
acceptance_criteria: CelebrationFactory method getCelebrationConfig(context) returns particle config based on chapter, stars, etc.
startCelebration reads from CelebrationFactory instead of hardcoded values
All context passed cleanly from main.js completion flow

tasks.description: Screen-wide pulse effect that matches chapter color — brief full-screen overlay flash in the chapter's signature color on any level completion
acceptance_criteria: On level completion, the victory flash overlay uses the current chapter's color instead of always white
Pulse lasts ~500ms and fades smoothly
Falls back to white/gold for challenge mode and non-chapter contexts

testing_focus: Test celebration in each chapter (1-6+) to verify unique particle types
Test first-time vs improvement intensity difference
Verify no regression on challenge mode celebrations
Verify Pure Logic particle trigger only on first-time no-hint completion
Check performance with max particles (3-star + improvement + pure logic)
Mobile: verify celebration canvas sizing and particle rendering
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced or existing celebrations break, revert to previous commit
